task_description: find all directories with names longer than 20 characters

```bash
echo "Checking current directory name length..."
current_dir_name=$(basename "$PWD")
current_dir_length=${#current_dir_name}
echo "Current directory name: $current_dir_name"
echo "Current directory name length: $current_dir_length"
```

```bash
echo "Searching subdirectories for names longer than 20 characters..."
find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec bash -c 'for dir; do if [ ${#dir} -gt 20 ]; then echo "$dir"; fi done' _ {} +
```
